user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Hi,

I’m sorry this has been so frustrating. I understand why you’re upset, and I want to help resolve this as quickly as possible.

Please send me a brief summary of what happened, along with any error messages or screenshots if you have them. I’ll review it right away and work with you on the next step.

If you’d prefer, I can also help escalate this to a specialist so it gets extra attention.

Thank you for your patience.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the instructions to draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges the customer's frustration as requested.
